title: ﻿CPC outage + Venezuela re-routing lift Aframax demand in Gulf of Mexico
section_path: ﻿CPC outage + Venezuela re-routing lift Aframax demand in Gulf of Mexico
section_path_text: ﻿CPC outage + Venezuela re-routing lift Aframax demand in Gulf of Mexico
summary:
Main
Strong European demand for WTI and a rise in liftings of Venezuelan crude to US Gulf have boosted the region's Aframax rates to the point where Suezmaxes are now more competitive. The spot market for TD25 (Aframax from US Gulf to Europe) has risen sharply since the start of last week, up from around $70k/day to over $92k/day today. Rates have increased nearly 50% since the start of January.
